basic_details.job_title: CMET Thrissur Lab Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Associate, Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Centre For Materials For Electronics Technology
basic_details.short_information: Centre For Materials For Electronics Technology (CMET) Project Associate-I / Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released under Advt No. CMET/TH/ADM/003/2026 on the official website of Centre For Materials For Electronics Technology . A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CMET Project Associate-I / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years (as on 30-04-2026) Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc. (Chemistry) with 60% marks / 1st class, 3 Years Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering with 1st Class/60% marks
qualification.details: Project Associate-I: 60% marks / 1st class in MSc. (Chemistry) from a recognized University or equivalent. Project Assistant: 1st Class/ 60% marks in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering 3 Years Diploma.

salary_details.details: Project Associate-I: Rs. 37,000/- per month Project Assistant: Rs. 27,000/-

selection_process: Written Test for initial screening if many candidates Interview Document Verification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CMET Thrissur Lab Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Project Assistant is scheduled for 12th May 2026, and for Project Associate-I, it is on 13th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on the respective dates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the maximum age limit for the posts advertised by CMET Thrissur Lab?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 28 years as of 30th April 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate-I and Project Assistant positions?
faq.answer: For Project Associate-I, an MSc in Chemistry with 60% marks or 1st class is required. For Project Assistant, a 3-year Diploma in Electrical or Mechanical Engineering with 1st Class/60% marks is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for CMET Thrissur Lab Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I and Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 27,000/- to Rs. 37,000/- per month, depending on the post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available in the CMET Thrissur Lab Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Project Associate-I and Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of the contract for these positions?
faq.answer: The project duration is up to 29th March 2028, indicating a contractual appointment for the specified period.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the CMET Thrissur Lab located?
faq.answer: CMET Thrissur Lab is located in Thrissur, Kerala, with the pincode 680581. The exact venue for the walk-in interview will be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CMET Thrissur Lab Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Project Assistant is scheduled for 12th May 2026, and for Project Associate-I, it is on 13th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on the respective dates.
